CustomField.formula:
IF (New_Hospital_Guarantee__c = TRUE, ( "Notwithstanding the foregoing, Company shall pay to Provider $" & text( floor(Preventive_Care_Agreement__r.Rate__c) ) + "." + right( text( ( 1 + Preventive_Care_Agreement__r.Rate__c - floor( Preventive_Care_Agreement__r.Rate__c ) ) * 100 ), 2 ) & "/ hour for shifts worked at Hospital during the first " & CASE (text(Preventive_Care_Agreement__r.Months_Startup_Guarantee__c), "1", "one", "2", "two", "3", "three", "4", "four", "5", "five", "6", "six", "7", "seven", "8", "eight", "9", "nine", "10", "ten", "11", "eleven", "12", "twelve","N/A")
& " (" & text(Preventive_Care_Agreement__r.Months_Startup_Guarantee__c) & ") calendar months after the state date of Company’s contract with Hospital."),
"")
CustomField.label: New Hospital Guarantee Clause
